root_cause: Container runtime version or CRI API mismatch on node
evidence: Node Ready condition indicates container runtime API/version incompatibility
Timeline contains kubelet runtime signal showing CRI API/version mismatch
Pod is assigned to node node1

causes.message: Kubelet reached the runtime endpoint but encountered an unsupported CRI API/version
Node container runtime version or CRI API is incompatible with kubelet expectations
Kubelet cannot create pod sandboxes or manage workloads due to runtime API mismatch

node:node1: Node runtime reports CRI API/version mismatch (Ready reason=KubeletNotReady)
pod:runtime-version-mismatch-pod: Pod is blocked because kubelet and the node container runtime are version-incompatible

likely_causes: Kubelet was upgraded but containerd/cri-o was left on an incompatible CRI version
Runtime exposes an unsupported CRI API version for this kubelet release
Node upgrade left kubelet and runtime components out of sync
Runtime plugin or CRI shim version is incompatible with kubelet expectations
suggested_checks: Check kubelet and container runtime versions on the node
Inspect kubelet logs for CRI API/version compatibility errors
